mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, merchant_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, quantity, unit_price, total_price, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, u.username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN merchants m ON o.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT o.*, m.shop_name as merchantShopName FROM orders o LEFT JOIN merchants m ON o.merchant_id = m.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT o.*, u.username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT o.*, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, u.username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN merchants m ON o.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
